display_information.name: Databuddy
display_information.description: Ask Databuddy analytics questions from Slack.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Ask Databuddy about analytics, traffic, conversions, campaigns, and product usage.

suggested_prompts.title: Traffic summary
suggested_prompts.message: Summarize traffic for the last 7 days.

suggested_prompts.title: Conversion drop
suggested_prompts.message: Explain the biggest conversion changes this week.

suggested_prompts.title: Top sources
suggested_prompts.message: What are our top referrers right now?

slash_commands.usage_hint: help | bind | unbind | summarize traffic for the last 7 days

slash_commands.description: Bind this channel to a Databuddy website.
Remove this channel's Databuddy website binding.
